title: Fix intermittent 'failed to show menu' error for food menu and payment options

requirements.summary: Fix intermittent failure in food menu display with robust error handling and retry logic
acceptanceCriteria: Menu items load successfully on repeated page visits without intermittent blank states
When loading fails, a clear error message with a 'Try Again' retry button is shown
The React Query hook for menu items uses retry logic (at least 3 retries with backoff) to handle transient backend failures
Loading skeleton is shown while data is being fetched or retried

file_operations.description: Enhance the useMenuItems query hook with retry logic: configure retry: 3, retryDelay: (attemptIndex) => Math.min(1000 * 2 ** attemptIndex, 30000) to implement exponential backoff for transient failures. Add staleTime and gcTime configuration to prevent unnecessary refetches that might trigger errors.

Add comprehensive error state handling to MenuDisplay: when the useMenuItems query returns an error, display a user-friendly error message with a 'Try Again' button that calls refetch(). Ensure the loading skeleton is shown during initial load and retries. Replace any blank error states with clear messaging explaining the issue and offering retry.

requirements.summary: Fix intermittent failure in payment options display with error boundaries, retry logic, and fallback UI
acceptanceCriteria: Payment QR code and payment options render consistently without intermittent blank or error states
When the QR code query fails, a user-friendly error message with a retry button is displayed instead of a blank payment page
The React Query hook for the payment QR code uses retry logic (at least 3 retries with backoff)
The PaymentQRCodeModal also handles loading and error states gracefully

file_operations.description: Enhance the usePaymentQRCode query hook with retry logic: configure retry: 3, retryDelay: (attemptIndex) => Math.min(1000 * 2 ** attemptIndex, 30000) to implement exponential backoff. Add staleTime configuration to reduce unnecessary refetches.

Add comprehensive error handling to PaymentPage: when usePaymentQRCode returns an error, display a user-friendly error message with a 'Try Again' button that calls refetch(). Show a loading state while the QR code is being fetched or retried. Ensure the page never renders blank when the query fails.

Add loading and error state handling to PaymentQRCodeModal: display a loading skeleton while the QR code is being fetched, and show a fallback error message with retry option if the QR code fails to load. Ensure the modal never shows a blank state.

requirements.summary: Add global error boundary component to catch unhandled React rendering errors
acceptanceCriteria: A React error boundary wraps the main route content in App.tsx
When any page crashes, the error boundary shows a branded error screen with a 'Reload' button
Error boundary does not interfere with normal application flow

file_operations.description: Create an ErrorBoundary class component that catches React rendering errors using componentDidCatch lifecycle method. The fallback UI should display a branded Punjabi Bites error screen with the error message and a 'Reload Page' button that calls window.location.reload(). Include proper TypeScript types for props (children) and state (hasError, error).

Wrap the RouterProvider component with the new ErrorBoundary component to catch rendering errors across all routes. Import ErrorBoundary from './components/ErrorBoundary' and wrap it around the existing RouterProvider without changing the route structure or other providers.
